name: mailvec
description: Local hybrid (FTS5 + vector) search over your Maildir email archive.
long_description: Mailvec exposes the local Mailvec archive (built by the indexer/embedder background services) over MCP. Provides search_emails (keyword, semantic, or hybrid), get_email, get_thread, list_folders, and get_attachment against a SQLite database with sqlite-vec embeddings. The bundled binary is the read-side stdio server only; the indexer and embedder are run separately as your own services. get_attachment saves attachments to ~/Downloads/mailvec/ and returns the path — to read the contents from Claude.ai or Claude Desktop, install a filesystem MCP server (e.g. @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem) pointed at that directory. In Claude Code, the built-in Read tool opens saved files directly with no extra MCP needed.

database_path.title: Database path
database_path.description: Path to the Mailvec SQLite archive. Will be created on first run if it doesn't exist.

maildir_root.title: Maildir root
maildir_root.description: Path to the directory containing your Maildir folders (where mbsync syncs your mail). Used by get_attachment to read bytes from the original .eml files. Should match the same path the indexer is configured with. Leave at the default if get_attachment isn't important to you — the rest of the tools work without it.

ollama_base_url.title: Ollama endpoint
ollama_base_url.description: Where the Ollama server is reachable. Used to embed search queries for semantic and hybrid search.

fastmail_account_id.title: Fastmail account id (optional)
fastmail_account_id.description: Enables Fastmail webmail deep-links on search/get results. Format: 'u' followed by 8 hex chars — copy the '?u=...' query param off any app.fastmail.com URL. Leave blank to disable.

log_tool_calls.title: Log tool calls (debug)
log_tool_calls.description: When on, the server logs each tool invocation (args + result summary) to ~/Library/Logs/Claude/mcp-server-mailvec.log. Useful for picking real Claude examples to iterate on result quality. Leave off in normal use.

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Search the archive by keyword, semantic similarity, or hybrid RRF fusion. Supports folder, date, and sender filters.

tools.name: get_email
tools.description: Fetch a single message by its message_id header or internal id. Returns body text and per-attachment metadata.

tools.name: get_thread
tools.description: Fetch all messages in a thread given any message in the thread.

tools.name: list_folders
tools.description: List Maildir folders with message counts.

tools.name: get_attachment
tools.description: Save an email attachment to ~/Downloads/mailvec/ and return the absolute path. Images are also returned inline (Claude vision); small text-ish files have their decoded UTF-8 included. To read other formats (PDF, DOCX, etc.), use a filesystem MCP server or Claude Code's built-in Read on the returned path.
